title: SARIF AI emit profile — result object
description: Input contract for a single SARIF result an AI producer emits via the add-result verb. An overlay on the canonical SARIF 2.1.0 result: it reuses the base shape by $ref and tightens it for the AI profile, requiring the fields the profile mandates and forbidding the index/identity state the multitool assigns at finalize.

ruleId.description: Either a CWE sub-id 'CWE-<number>/<sub-id>' (e.g. CWE-89/kql-injection-from-config) or the NOVEL escape hatch 'NOVEL-<sub-id>'. The sub-id is lowercase-alphanumeric kebab: single hyphens, no leading/trailing/consecutive hyphen. The CWE- and NOVEL- prefixes are disjoint, so this anyOf is exact — a NOVEL- id can never satisfy the CWE branch and a CWE- id can never satisfy the NOVEL branch (so e.g. 'NOVEL-foo/bar' is rejected by both).

message.description: message.markdown is required and must contain non-whitespace.

locations.description: At least one location. A location bearing a physicalLocation must carry a region whose startLine is an integer >= 1. Producer-supplied artifactLocation.index is forbidden; the multitool assigns indices at finalize.
